authority: Adapter contract + health ledger; degraded/failed adapters must stay visible, never hidden.

adapters.authority: D-local filesystem metadata only; not GitHub or provider truth.
adapters.secret_policy: refuse secret-shaped paths; redact secret-shaped content; never read .env/keys/tokens/cookies/auth stores
adapters.mutation_policy: no provider mutation, no deploy, no push, no external send, no payment/auth/schema change

adapters.mutation_policy: no provider mutation, no deploy, no push, no external send, no payment/auth/schema change
unknowns: drive free-space, health, and backup freshness are not checked in this slice

adapters.authority: Model adapter records only; no server start, no model download, no paid API call.
